URL: https://github.com/GraphiteEditor/Graphite
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Gemini CLI & Hermes Agent. Only official website: ccswitch.io

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firecrawl/pdf-inspector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firecrawl/pdf-inspector
Language: rust
Fast Rust library for PDF inspection, classification, and text extraction. Intelligently detects scanned vs text-based PDFs to enable smart routing decisions.

URL: https://github.com/influxdata/influxdb

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jely2002/youtube-dl-gui
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: katanemo/plano
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/katanemo/plano
Language: rust
Plano is an AI-native proxy and data plane for agentic apps — with built-in orchestration, safety, observability, and smart LLM routing so you stay focused on your agents core logic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lakehq/sail
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lakehq/sail
Language: rust
Drop-in Apache Spark replacement written in Rust, unifying batch processing, stream processing, and compute-intensive AI workloads.

URL: https://github.com/modrinth/code
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
